entry.title: Re: RFC between Production and development is not working
entry.content: Hello Kishan Telnet connection to the gateway port between Production and Development is working fine. Are you suggesting that we should examine only the firewall logs to understand why it is being blocked?

entry.title: Re: RFC between Production and development is not working
entry.content:
Hello,

There can be multiple reasons causing this issue and firewall block can be one of those. Does your Production system have multiple application servers and cluster setup for message server? Has the RFC been configured to call the correct message server hostname/port and server group? Have you tried the RFC by connecting to specific production application server and bypassing the message server?

If these are correctly verified, I would then suggest checking SAP Notes and links below:

500235 - Network Diagnosis with NIPING - SAP for Me

2507582 - 10054: WSAECONNRESET: Connection reset by peer - SAP for Me

ISSUE #2: Partner … not reached | SAP Help Portal

These suggest further checks to be performed. TCP/IP flow dumps and firewall connectivity logs need to be checked if everything from SAP application perspective has been checked/verified. Hope this helps.

Regards,

Kishan

entry.title: Re: Exchange rate at Project builder
entry.content: Dear Marcio, thanks for your reply. We use controlling currency and company currency is different, because we have multiple company code. If there is no fixed exchange rate, that we will have exchange rate fluctuation, but now your answer is clear. Thanks a lot.

entry.title: API or CDS for Manage Posting Periods
entry.content:
We are going to post journal entries from an external system to S/4HANA Cloud public edition.
I would like to check whether the posting date specified in the external system is within the open range set in Manage Posting Periods app.
However, I cannot find a standard API or CDS view to export information about open periods set in SAP.
Please let me know if there is anything relevant.

entry.title: Check requirements to set up SAP HANA High Availability for SAP Business One
entry.content:
Hello experts,

Referring to the file below, I'm in the middle of preparing for setting up a HA environment now.
File name : Setting_Up_SAP_HANA_Database_High_Availability_for_SAP_Business_One_10.0_for_Automatic_Failover.pdf

Please refer to the image below.

Wondering if it is possible to install SUSE Linux Enterprise 15 SP4 as central server OS instead of SUSE Linux Enterprise 15 SP2 for SAP Application.

FYI, to give you more clarity on versions, here is the list of 4 types which can exist based on the above.
(1) SUSE Linux Enterprise 15 SP2 for SAP Application
(2) SUSE Linux Enterprise 15 SP2
(3) SUSE Linux Enterprise 15 SP4 for SAP Application
(4) SUSE Linux Enterprise 15 SP4

Looking forward to your reply.
Thanks in advance. 🙂

Bests,
Wonuk Jeon

entry.title: Re: Check requirements to set up SAP HANA High Availabili...
entry.content:
Hello Wonuk,

Based on the information you provided and SAP Note 2235581, I would strongly recommend going for the SLES for SAP Application. Benefits of using the SAP specific flavor is due to additional features and extended support cycles.

Regarding SLES 15 version, in general both SP2 and SP4 versions are supported but there are dependencies on corresponding HANA versions supported and Business One requirements. You would need check and corelate all these to come to a decision. I would recommend going to newer SP version if all dependencies are satisfied.

Regards, Kishan

entry.title: Re: solr server is not started along with hybris server v...
entry.content:
Make sure you include "solrserver" into your localextensions.xml:

<extension name="solrserver" />

entry.title: Re: Integrating AI with SAPUI5 Fiori Apps: Part 3 - Building an AI Chatbot Assistant
entry.content: @Cocquerel I focussed this blog series for frontend developers, to integrate SAPUI5 apps (Freestyle/Fiori Elements) directly with LLMs without a dedicated 'application backend' (i.e. CAP or other backends) like in a full-stack app. In the subsequent blogs, I'm planning on writing about RAG with/without CAP LLM Plugin.

entry.title: Re: CSError com.sap.db.jdbc.ParameterMetaData
entry.content:
Hello,

Please have a look at the solutions suggested in similar thread Solved: Business Objects 4.0 Server Restart Order - SAP Community. This might help.

Regads, Kishan

entry.title: Tutorial with JavaScript to Customize Correspondence Format SAP06
entry.content:
Can anyone share a tutorial with the practical steps to follow in S/4HANA CLOUD PUBLIC to customize a SAP06 correspondence (Account Statement) with all the necessary business logic? We have a client from Peru and Chile who requires it. We already know how to work with branding, but we are missing examples to add code with JavaScript within Adobe. 

Fiori ID F0744A

Kind regards

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition ： 如何及时发现受影响的项目并采取升级行动？
entry.content: 👍

entry.title: Total Commitment Cost should not reduce after booking of actual expenditure in CN41N
entry.content:
How can I stop column "Total commitment Cost" in report CN41N to reduce after booking of actual through GR / SES in Project System.

I want that "Total Commitment Cost" column should be same even after booking of actual expenditure through SES or GR.

Thanks and Regards

entry.title: Re: Audit question - Moving Average Unit Cost - How to se...
entry.content:
As mentioned in previous responses, the only way to get more detailed moving average price data is to increase the pricing unit.

The moving average price has no bearing on the value of your inventory so you do not need to justify the rounding differences to an auditor.  It is simply the value that will be used to value future goods issue transactions.

If you posted a goods issue for your 329 pieces of inventory I think you are correct and the transaction would be valued at 10,093.72 with a variance account posting for 0.69 (depending on your account determination setup).  That is where the discrepancy is accounted for.  You will not find the additional decimal places you are looking for in the moving average price.

entry.title: Re: SAP DM - How to lock an order
entry.content: As default we already use a 2 stage release process. First you release the order in ERP which then integrates it to SAP DM, then when you are ready to start work you carry out the 2nd release In SAP DM which releases it to the shop floor ready for the operators to start work on it.

entry.title: Re: RFC between Production and development is not working
entry.content: Hello Kishan , Please find my answer Does your Production system have multiple application servers and cluster setup for message server? The Production system does not have a cluster or any application server. Has the RFC been configured to call the correct message server hostname/port and server group? Yes Have you tried the RFC by connecting to specific production application server and bypassing the message server? Production system is a single system and does not have any application server

entry.title: Re: How to update Calculated Measure based on Page or Inp...

Hi Vasu_Sac, 

  Starting from 2024 QRC3( wave 2024.10), descriptions will be supported for story calculation, so you can have same text for two calculations on two pages. 

 

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/what-s-new-in-sap-analytics-cloud-release-2024-10/ba-p/13703898?emcs_t=S2h8ZW1haWx8ZGlnZXN0X25vdGlmaWNhdGlvbnxMV0E0U083UUFYTkZPMHwtMXxPVEhFUlN8aEs

entry.title: INVENTORY TURN
entry.content:
Dear experts,

I need to see the inventory turn report and is there any t-code for that ?

I was asked to get the list of slow moving inventory list and I currently have no idea where to look at..

for example, say item 'A' is in the storage and I wanna see the very first posting that of that item 'A' and all the movement since then...or to see the list of items that have no movement but is in the palnt.

I know i can check individual item in MB51 but this one doesn't give you the first posting date and too detailed.

So I need a report that can generate the first posting date and movement since then to see what items are not moving..

FYI below is the version I am using now.

entry.title: Re: Audit question - Moving Average Unit Cost - How to se...
entry.content: Thank you Robyn. Would you say then that this statement is misleading? The Total Inventory Value = Moving Average Price x Quantity on Hand? Would it be more accurate to say, Moving Average Price = Total Inventory Value / Quantity on Hand?

Eva

entry.title: Re: Audit question - Moving Average Unit Cost - How to se...
entry.content: Adding to reply to Robyn... also of course, then the MAC be displayed as 2 decimals and can be easily explained as rounding. versus the other way around where it is not.

entry.title: Re: SAP DM - How to lock an order
entry.content:
Thank you for answering my question.

I have another question about SFC auto-release setting.

(https://help.sap.com/docs/sap-digital-manufacturing/execution/enabling-auto-release-of-production-and-process-orders?locale=en-US)

Is it possible to switch auto-release setting depending on material?

entry.title: DocEntry hyper link not working
entry.content:
Hi All

Is this Query limitation cannot have DocEntry hyper link to drill into posted transactions in this customized Query?

 

SELECT

T8.DocEntry, T8.DocNum,
T2.DocNum,
T7a.[U_AF_MAJORGRP], T7a.[U_AF_OVERGRP],
T7b.ItmsGrpNam,
T7.ItemCode, T7.Dscription,
T7.Quantity, T7a.InvntryUom, T8.DocDate, T8.DocDueDate,
T8.CardCode, T8.CardName, T7.Price

 

--T6.DocNum,
--T10.DocNum

FROM POR1 T1
LEFT OUTER JOIN OPOR T2
ON T1.DocEntry = T2.DocEntry
LEFT OUTER JOIN PDN1 T3
ON T2.DocEntry = T3.BaseEntry
AND T1.LineNum = T3.BaseLine
AND T1.ItemCode = T3.ItemCode
LEFT OUTER JOIN OPDN T4 ON T3.DocEntry = T4.DocEntry
LEFT OUTER JOIN RPD1 T5 ON T4.DocEntry = T5.BaseEntry AND T3.LineNum = T5.BaseLine AND T3.ItemCode = T5.ItemCode
LEFT OUTER JOIN ORPD T6 ON T5.DocEntry = T6.DocEntry
LEFT OUTER JOIN PCH1 T7 ON T4.DocEntry = T7.BaseEntry AND T3.LineNum = T7.BaseLine AND T3.ItemCode = T7.ItemCode
LEFT OUTER JOIN OPCH T8 ON T7.DocEntry = T8.DocEntry
LEFT OUTER JOIN OITM T7a ON T7.[ItemCode] = T7a.[ItemCode]
INNER JOIN OITB T7b ON T7a.[ItmsGrpCod] = T7b.[ItmsGrpCod]
LEFT OUTER JOIN RPC1 T9 ON T8.DocEntry = T9.BaseEntry AND T7.LineNum = T9.BaseLine AND T7.ItemCode = T9.ItemCode
LEFT OUTER JOIN ORPC T10 ON T9.DocEntry = T10.DocEntry

WHERE
T8.[DocDate] >=[%0] and T8.[DocDate] <=[%1]
ORDER BY

--T2.DocNum,
--T1.LineNum,
--T4.DocNum,
--T3.LineNum,
--T6.DocNum,
--T5.LineNum,
T8.DocNum
--T7.LineNum,
--T10.DocNum,
--T9.LineNum

 

 

Kedalene Chong

Can JWT token supports both directions with CPI ?

Vasu

entry.title: Re: Welcome to our SAP Learning Group moderated by SAP Learning Experts
entry.content: I am so excited to be part of this community. I am eager to learn about SAP SuccessFactors Onboarding 2.0 and SAP Datasphere. It would be nice if anyone can share resources on the same.

entry.title: Re: RFC between Production and development is not working
entry.content: Hello, In this case I would request you to run the niping tests as well as per SAP Note 500235. If there are no issues shown in the niping tests, you would need to check firewall/TCP trace/logs. Also please raise an incident to BC-MID-RFC for further investigation. Thanks, Kishan

entry.title: Re: MARA Table missing from Developer Edition
entry.content:
Hi Brian,

OnPrem Developer Edition is just the "Netweaver ABAP" - it contains only the technical foundation for the business systems.

Table MARA (Material Master or Product) is not part of the technical foundation. 'MARA' is delivered by the ERP solutions like ECC6.0 or S/4HANA.

For training regarding table MARA, you'll need a training system with ERP. As far as i know such a system is not available as a developer edition.

Best Regards

Eric

entry.title: FMS Item Code from OITM UDF in Sales Quotation
entry.content:
Hi All

I managed to write this FMS Query to auto Select T0.ItemCode from OITM where T0.U_A_CatNo =$[$38.U_A_CatNo.0] and able to search Item Number after typing BT Catalogue UDF but once I TAB to next field BT Catalogue UDF value disappeared.  Please advise is there any step I missed out or is this a FMS limitation search on Item Master Data UDF in Sales Quotation?

 

Select T0.ItemCode from OITM where T0.U_A_CatNo =$[$38.U_A_CatNo.0]

 

 

 

 

Kedalene Chong

entry.title: Re: Group Reporting - Import Validation Settings
entry.content: The excel is basically extraction of involved database tables and fields with technical field names shown, which is not comprehensible by regular users. It's not intended for users to create rules in the excel..

entry.title: Re: INVENTORY TURN
entry.content:
Hi, if you want to see when PGR or any other mat doc was posted, mentioned MB51 is fine. If you need to see movement within storage bins the LT23 (or WT if EWM) overview should be enough - you can see any single movement between storage bins and also you can deduct the PGR date from here

 

Standa

entry.title: Re: SAP REPORT QUERY
entry.content: Post by Mistek

entry.title: Re: SAP Product Inspiration Series for Industries & Intelligent CX (Wave #2)

entry.title: Re: Consuming SAP with SAP Build Apps - Web App in SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition
entry.content:
Hi @JoaquinD ,

To answer you first question, the deployed app should be visible in the list of HTML5 Applications, accessible through the BTP Cockpit (see my last screenshot in the blog post). It is not clear to me where you are navigating to in SAP Build Apps. The MTA file built using the build service in SAP Build Apps can still be found in the UI of the build service. 

As you need to select a BTP end point, Cloud Foundry organisation and space, you might have deployed your app into another space.

Regards,
Ludo

entry.title: Nadchodzące spotkania SAP Community - czerwiec/lipiec 2024

to już jutro widzimy się na następnym SAP Stammtisch - luźnym spotkaniu przy piwie grupy SAPowej z Katowic i okolic: katowice-sap-stammtisch-26-06-2024

Tym razem w zielonym otoczeniu, więc nie może Cię zabraknąć 🙂 Zapowiada się ciepło i słonecznie, więc na pewno zadbamy o nawodnienie naszych organizmów 😉 Dajcie znać jeżeli się wybieracie pod postem wydarzenia (link wyżej), by tym zachęcić niezdecydowanych do przyjścia 😉 

Z innych wydarzeń, dziejących się po sąsiedzku - @Vitaliy-R organizuje SIT we Wrocławiu, który odbędzie się już 6 lipca. Zapisy przez formularz: SIT Wroc a więcej na ten temat przeczytacie w poście: sap-inside-track-wroclaw-2024 

Do zobaczenia!

entry.title: Re: MARA Table missing from Developer Edition
entry.content: You can rent a fully functional S/4 HANA ERP system on cal.sap.com and pay as you use; but it would be a time limited demo system - so it's not supposed to be used forever.

entry.title: Re: Navigation to Detail Page does not work using FPM & U...
entry.content:
I usually use this code to access the router (router is initialized in Component):

const oRouter = this.getOwnerComponent().getRouter();

I also see duplicate id's in your console. You should remove that also, the app won't work otherwise.

Regards,

Noël

entry.title: When the field in the RCM offer letter template is set to 'yes', the portlet would be visible in EC
entry.content:
Hi Community,

If the fields 'Travel Allowance Remarks', 'Relocation Expenses', and 'Notice Buyback Remarks' in the RCM Offer Letter template are set to 'yes', the Reimbursement portlet should be visible in Employee Central for the respective employees.

Please let us know the feasibility.

Thanks.

MC44 - Inventory Turnover

entry.title: Re: ODataModel not getting called when adding authorizati...
entry.content:
Thanks to a discussion on GitHub I've narrowed it down a bit more. 

If I use curl I can see that calls directly to the destination and localhost works

curl -I --header "Authorization: Bearer <token>" https://successfactors.dest/odata/v2/$metadata
curl -I --header "Authorization: Bearer <token>" https://localhost:8080/odata/v2/$metadata

However calls to the BAS proxy does not work
curl -I --header "Authorization: Bearer <token>" https://port8080-workspaces-xxxxxxx.eu20.applicationstudio.cloud.sap/odata/v2/$metadata

This calls again gives me 401 and never shows up in backend-proxy-middleware

entry.title: Re: DocEntry hyper link not working
entry.content:
Hi,

you can't mix up different DocTypes

regards Lothar

entry.title: Re: MARA Table missing from Developer Edition
entry.content: As eric says: it´s a Netweaver system not an ERP system. So if you are going to learn ABAP find the learning material that i.ex. uses the tables SCARR, SPFLI and SFLIGHT. Theese are used in the Demo Flight Company that should be in all Netweaver systems

entry.title: Re: Check requirements to set up SAP HANA High Availabili...
entry.content:
Hello,

 

SLES for SAP Application is mandatory for automatic failover solution. 

To determine SLES15 SP version, you should refer to the SAP Business One Administrator's guide or overview note for the specific SAP Business One patch version. for example, if you intend to use SAP Business One 10.0 FP 2405, the supported SLES version is 15 SP3, SP4 and SP5.

 

the excerpts from 

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_BUSINESS_ONE_ADMIN_GUIDE_HANA/1a2fc202f7f64336abf9fbc957d9b9ba/13c43452877d4feaad4dbd661d15d9bb.html?version=10.0_SP_2405

entry.title: Re: Bidirectional Cross Filtering in Datasphere
entry.content: The analytical concept of bi-directional cross-filtering is not something that translates easily to SQL based modeling in a graphical view in Datasphere. Datasphere is not a report modeling tool. I think the concept better compares to the "linked analysis" that you can find in SAP Analytics Cloud, where you would model your reporting, and where you can "link" datasets.

entry.title: Re: How to split rows of data?
entry.content: That makes sense, can you maybe help me understand how you would do this for a data set with about 180.000 rows?

entry.title: Re: Mass maintenance of business partner
entry.content:
Hi Michal

Are you using SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition or Private Edition? 

In Private Edition you could app F6553 Import Master Data Business Partners

i.e.  https://fioriappslibrary.hana.ondemand.com/sap/fix/externalViewer/#/detail/Apps('F6553')/S28OP 

If you are using Public Edition, you might request that this app be made available - e.g via Customer influence request

Best

Jocelyn

entry.title: Re: Data Action - Allocation

entry.title: what is the use of Reference date field in miro tcode
entry.content: what is the use of Reference date field , which date we have to give here, previous  it does'nt asked me but now it was asking me to enter reference date , what is the reason.

entry.title: SSCUI: Assign Schedule Line Categories 对Cloud客户开放
entry.content:
业务需求

客户对免费订单产品无需产生MRP需求和ATP检查，希望订单自动带出计划行CN

产品实现

S/4HANA CLOUD 2402版本开放了SSCUI：Assign Schedule Line Categories的部分设定

客户可以将行项目CBXN的默认计划行CP改成CN

以下是一些常用Schedule Line Categories的解释：

  • The schedule line AT in inquiries is used only for information.

  • No requirements are transferred and no availability check is carried out for the schedule lines BN and CN.

  • Requirements are transferred and the availability of the material is checked for the schedule lines BP and CP.

  • No stocks are managed for the schedule line categories BT, CT and CX. No goods issue is posted for the categories BT and CT. However, goods issue is posted for CX.

  • The schedule line categories BV and CV are controlled in the same manner as the categories BN and CN. However, requirements can be passed on for analysis purposes.

  • Goods receipt is posted for the schedule line DN in a returns document.

  • The schedule line categories CN, CP, CT, and CV are relevant for delivery; the other schedule line categories are not.

 

感谢观看

entry.title: Premium Hub CoE – DSC SAP TM hide the Sections / Tabs of Freight Order for User using Customization
entry.content:
Freight Order has Various sections and Tabs which are provided to planner. Some sections or tabs may not be relevant for planners.

We can hide the Sections / Tabs of Freight Order for User using Customization. You can follow below steps to do these steps.

 

Open the Freight Order Application.

 

 

 

Right Click on the any section to open Context Menu

 

 

 

Open the Technical Help and Click on Component Configuration

 

 

 

Select Main Page, In Menu Bar for Other Functions

 

Create Customizing

 

 

 

Give Description

 

 

 

Select Transport Request

 

 

 

Select the section you want to Hide

 

 

 

Save and Open the Freight Order Again

 

 

 

The Section is not visible on Freight Order.

 

If user want to add this section again, User can select Change Page Layout

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

We Noticed some time Still the changes are not reflected for all Users, Kindly Verify if there is any Personalization done by User.

 

Run Transaction FPM_WD.

 

 

 

 

 

 

Delete any Personalization for user.

 

Best Regards,

Rohit

entry.title: Re: API or CDS for Manage Posting Periods

entry.title: Re: Modeling an advanced Hierarchy with Directory in SAP Datasphere

entry.title: Packaging items from a production order without packing instructions
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

We would like to use the transaction COP2 to create Handling Units for the products of a production order. We plan to post the goods receipt from production using the transaction COWBHUWE. When using COP2, it appears that a packing instruction must always be found or specified. Is the use of a packing instruction mandatory in COP2? If so, could a dummy packing instruction be created that allows for the selection and packaging of individual packing materials for each material? Is there perhaps another way to handle packaging items from a production order without packing instructions? (This is without EWM)

Thank you for your insights!

entry.title: "Check Connection" Button Got You Down? A few tips on destinations
entry.content:
I get messages from Builders ALL the time -- just today on LinkedIn -- saying they set up their destination and got an error when they clicked Check Connection.

The Check Connection button does NOT check everything about a destination, only that it is reachable. According to an SAP Note: 

"The Check Connection does not guarantee that a backend is operational. It only verifies if a connection to the backend is possible from network perspective."

Any code other than 500 is considered successful.

 
So, for example, if you set up a destination to the SAP Business Accelerator Hub, with the additional property of URL.headers.APIKey set your API key, you will get a 401. For some reason, the key is not sent in the header during this check.
But this is considered successful – notice the icon indicating the check was successful.
 
If your service has no authentication and no permission checks, it will succeed with 200 message.
 
If the service does require sign-in and the credentials are provided in the main area of the destination configuration (not in the additional properties), these will get sent and if set up correctly will also return 200.
Only if the server cannot be reached at all, like in this example where I misspelled the Northwind URL, will the check come back unsuccessful.
For more information on checking destinations, see the documentation (although this is from a Neo documentation set).

P.S.: 401 vs 403 -- For debugging, it is important to know the difference between 401 and 403 error codes. 401, even though its message is "Unauthorized", means that the user was not authenticated. 403 means the user was authenticated and their identity is known, but that they do not have permission to the resource. So when you get 401 for a connection to SAP Business Accelerator Hub, it is because your API key is not being sent -- or not being sent in the correct way -- and therefore the site does not know who you are.

entry.title: Re: Exporting BEx Queries from BW on HANA to BW4HANA??
entry.content:
Hi, 
Queries remain unchanged when moving to BW/4HANA. So for inplace conversion, there is no change needed normally. For shell/remote approaches, you simply collect the Queries you need to the transfer scope and import them to the target system. 
If changes are required beforehand, then RS_B4HANA_RC report will tell you. But in general, Queries belong to the few TLOGOs which remain untouched.
KR Frank

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content:
Hello @Jyotika_Bhatia welcome to SAP Community. Great chance to live some time in Switzerland. To extend your network there, I would like to recommend to check the Location Groups we have in Switzerland: St. Gallen and Zurich. This is the link to all European Groups: https://community.sap.com/t5/europe/ct-p/europe

Enjoy your stay in Europe.

entry.title: Re: Do we have a certificate for datasphere? thanks ~
entry.content:
Hello,

this certification is now possible 
https://learning.sap.com/certifications/sap-certified-associate-reporting-modelling-and-data-acquisition-with-sap-bw-4hana

entry.title: Re: DocEntry hyper link not working
entry.content:
You can try something like that to force OPCH

with DATA AS
(
SELECT
T8.DocEntry AS OPCHDocEntry
, T8.DocNum AS OPCHDocNum,
T2.DocNum,
--T7a.[U_AF_MAJORGRP]
--, T7a.[U_AF_OVERGRP],
T7b.ItmsGrpNam,
T7.ItemCode, T7.Dscription,
T7.Quantity, T7a.InvntryUom, T8.DocDate, T8.DocDueDate,
T8.CardCode, T8.CardName, T7.Price
--T6.DocNum,
--T10.DocNum
FROM POR1 T1
LEFT OUTER JOIN OPOR T2
ON T1.DocEntry = T2.DocEntry
LEFT OUTER JOIN PDN1 T3
ON T2.DocEntry = T3.BaseEntry
AND T1.LineNum = T3.BaseLine
AND T1.ItemCode = T3.ItemCode
LEFT OUTER JOIN OPDN T4 ON T3.DocEntry = T4.DocEntry
LEFT OUTER JOIN RPD1 T5 ON T4.DocEntry = T5.BaseEntry AND T3.LineNum = T5.BaseLine AND T3.ItemCode = T5.ItemCode
LEFT OUTER JOIN ORPD T6 ON T5.DocEntry = T6.DocEntry
LEFT OUTER JOIN PCH1 T7 ON T4.DocEntry = T7.BaseEntry AND T3.LineNum = T7.BaseLine AND T3.ItemCode = T7.ItemCode
LEFT OUTER JOIN OPCH T8 ON T7.DocEntry = T8.DocEntry
LEFT OUTER JOIN OITM T7a ON T7.[ItemCode] = T7a.[ItemCode]
INNER JOIN OITB T7b ON T7a.[ItmsGrpCod] = T7b.[ItmsGrpCod]
LEFT OUTER JOIN RPC1 T9 ON T8.DocEntry = T9.BaseEntry AND T7.LineNum = T9.BaseLine AND T7.ItemCode = T9.ItemCode
LEFT OUTER JOIN ORPC T10 ON T9.DocEntry = T10.DocEntry

WHERE
T8.[DocDate] >='20240601' and T8.[DocDate] <='20240610'
--ORDER BY

--T2.DocNum,
--T1.LineNum,
--T4.DocNum,
--T3.LineNum,
--T6.DocNum,
--T5.LineNum,
--T8.DocNum
--T7.LineNum,
--T10.DocNum,
--T9.LineNum
)
SELECT
OPCH.DocEntry
,OPCH.DocNum
,DATA.*
FROM
OPCH
INNER JOIN Data On DATA.OPCHDocEntry = OPCH.DocEntry

FOR BROWSE

regards Lothar

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content:
Welcome to all new members.

@Çınar : I would like to recommend a location group for you in Turkey: the Istanbul Group. I know it's quite far away from Ankara, but it's always good to connect with some locals. They are organizing regular community events, which you might want to attend some time. @barisguler is managing the group. Check it out and connect with others!

I would like to avoid calling the Iflow at every SFC start or complete.
Is there an alternative method to trigger the Iflow only when this specific message occurs?

Do you have any ideas on how to handle this?

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Apps. Refresh or direct call to a page always goes to home page.
entry.content:
Hi Adam,

Is this a mobile or a web app? Also Can you send a screen shot of your navigation bar and navigation configuration like below?

entry.title: Re: Error message not preventing users to submit the chan...
entry.content:
Dear Akhil, could you post your question directly in MDG. That would be great. The application might run in SAP Business Client, but for the methods and classes you have to ask the application team.

https://pages.community.sap.com/topics/master-data-governance

Kind Regards,

Sandra

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content:
Hello @clombardo welcome to SAP Community. If you want to connect with others in North America, I can recommend to check out the Location Groups there: https://community.sap.com/t5/americas/ct-p/americas.

Great opportunity to connect with other local community members, as there are oftentimes events happening. Maybe you find it interesting.

entry.title: CDS output to 3rd party
entry.content:
I used the standard CDS as underlying  CDS . we want the output of it to be send as e-mail to 3rd party


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: CDS output to 3rd party
entry.content: Published Custom CDS view or a custom Analytical Queries(built on top of Custom CDS view) do not have the capability to run by itself and then email it to the specified Target audience

entry.title: Why does the weight unit field automatically assign the value of KG when expanding the sales view?
entry.content: Why does the weight unit field automatically assign the value of KG when expanding the sales view?

entry.title: Re: How to set up public dimension for 2 company codes
entry.content: Alternatively, you can add the company code description as a property on the profit center. The property can be shown as a single column/bar in the table or chart.

entry.title: Re: DRF Custom ABAP BAdI Filter Implementation
entry.content:
Dear Gabor,

To begin with I would like to thank because you have published the blog around custom filter. I am also having similar kind of requirement please help me to get answer of following queries.

1. Can we filter the complete BP in ECC to follow this blog?  As we are not on S/4 and we need to  restrict the complete BP to be replicated to target system .  In your blog you mentioned S/4.

2. I have created custom class and all config is done. My breakpoint is not getting trigger . 

Any suggestion ?

 

Regards,

Rahul Khandelwal

entry.title: Re: Business Object Service Entry Sheet for Lean Services
entry.content:
Hi,

If you want to know more about API API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV, you can refer to API Business Hub https://hub.sap.com/api/API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV/overview for more detailed content. Hope it helps.

Best Regards and Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Do we have a certificate for datasphere? thanks ~
entry.content: Got it! Thanks ~

entry.title: Re: Error message not preventing users to submit the chan...
entry.content:
Hello @akhil_lal,

 

My recommendation is to not implement the check in your custom feeder class but to use one of the options offered by the MDG Framework to define quality checks and rules.

Depending on the release of your system, you have multiple possibilities:

  • Data Quality Management (DQM) - introduced with MDG on S/4HANA 1809; you can find several blogs (for example, this one) explaining in detail the functionalities;
  • BRF+ - no-code approach; here you can find a step-by-step guide for this
  • Code the rule in ABAP using the BAdI USMD_RULE_SERVICE - more details in this guide.

I hope this helps,

R.

entry.title: Re: Error in ABAP CDS View for annotation @Analytics.query: true
entry.content: Is it worked after adding @analytics.dataCategory: #CUBE annotation?

entry.title: Inquiry about SSL certificates
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I would like to ask for some advice regarding SSL certificates 

 

One of our clients currently using SAP B1 9.3 PL14 SQL version has raised a security issue with their current server SSL certification version.(SQL Version: SQL Server 2016 SP3 + GDR_13.0.6435.1) 

 

They have requested to regenerate the certificate from SHA1 to SHA256.

 

We have not issued an SSL certificate for the SAP server; it appears to have been generated by default during the server setup

 

I have a few questions regarding this matter

 

  1. The client does not use any web services at all, so we would like to inquire if the SSL certificate affects SAP.(The client's IT manager believes that the SSL certificate is applied even during regular SQL access. Currently, we are accessing the SQL server using SQL server authentication (sa account). We would like to confirm if the SSL certificate affects SQL access in this case as well)

 

  1. If you have any manuals or guides on updating the SSL certificate for the SAP B1 server, please provide them

 

  1. We would also like to inquire if there are any restrictions on the applicable SSL certifications for different versions of SAP

 

Thank you !!

entry.title: Re: How to calculate % in SAC Dashboard
entry.content:
Hi @N1kh1l ,

Does this mean I need to create a formula for every head in my story (there are 15+ heads)? Additionally, each head has multiple GL accounts under it, forming a hierarchy. How can the formula be calculated at the lower levels of this hierarchy?

Regards,
Tanya

entry.title: Re: Lead with Resilience
entry.content: Thanks for sharing and I am confident that Lead with Resilience would be a game changer for budding career aspirants. Is this course limited to certain audience or is open for SAP Community?

entry.title: Re: Error in ABAP CDS View for annotation @Analytics.query: true
entry.content: Hi, I have created a cube view also but still facing the issue, Is there any extra annotation required?

entry.title: Re: ABAP objects not editable
entry.content: It appears that you may not have the required service activated to perform that action. First, navigate to /N/IWFND/MAINT_SERVICE and check for the MIG_MC_ODATA_SRV service. If it is not activated, please activate it. That should resolve the issue.

entry.title: Re: Create a new company in FSM and update all users with no access in user policy group/person
entry.content: Hello Deborah, did you find a solution. I have the same problem. Guido

entry.title: Re: SAC Catalog File request
entry.content: Hi William, can you say if we have any possibility to find all catalogs/teams for which we didn't select "Grant read access" when published to Catalogs?

entry.title: Re: Auto layout to beautify Integration Flow in the Cloud Integration capability of SAP Integration
entry.content: I have the same problem. Clicking on arrange horizontally nothing happens. Do you have a solution?

entry.title: Re: Finally a declaration of immutable variables with FINAL in ABAP
entry.content: @ptrck 7.89 and 7.57

Kind regards 

Erik

entry.title: Re: Gain insights on processes having complex relationship using SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Hi @SandhyaG 

Thanks for sharing.
We tried to follow the same approach but we are facing a problem. 
The column is not showing the text/value maintained in the calculated attribute constant value:-

Dashboard:-

Could you please help or suggest ?
Thanks,

Aakash Gupta

entry.title: Re: How to Configure Email- Notification to T-code WLF_IDOC(IDoc Monitoring) in S/4 for error record
entry.content:
Hello, 

Finally we found out the solution. We have created a shared distribution list with SO23 transaction, then we used this list with SM36 and program of WLF_IDOC.

Kind regards

entry.title: Customizing Fiori app navigation in BAS
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have a requirement where we need to navigate to a customized object page from List report page.

I tried giving std sematic object and action of object page and provided customized app id in target mapping but still it navigates to standard object page. we are using BAS and we have only manifest-appdescr-variant file.

Can anyone help on how we can achieve the navigation from list report page to customized object page? is there anyway to override the standard navigation ?

Thanks,

entry.title: in order with multiple items is it possible to change UNIT DELIVEY NOTE for U to N with one action ?
entry.content: in order with multiple items is it possible to change "UNIT DELIVEY NOTE" for U to N with one quick action for all items ?

entry.title: Re: S/4Hana Cloud - Cloud Appliance Library
entry.content: Hello Arthur, SAP CAL only contains on-premise solutions (although they are offered "cloud-like"). The SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition is a true SaaS solution and therefore not contained in CAL. If you would like to try it out, please see https://www.sap.com/products/erp/s4hana/trial.html. Best Joerg

entry.title: Re: Why do we need Allowance concept ?
entry.content:
Hello 

the allowance logic allows to set up some pricing rules with a life cycle shorter than the contract one. You can uncorrelate the allowance logic to the contract logic. 

Best regards,

Eric F.

entry.title: Re: Help with formula
entry.content:
Hmm, well you can put the softtabs in a scroll view and the user can then see all the tabs by scrolling, but I don't see a way of putting Today in the middle. You can use the Layout > Position property to reposition Today to the middle of the visible area, but then you'd have to create your own scrolling capability (not really scrolling more like moving).

You could simply start with yesterday, today and tomorrow and add a previous button and a later button to, for example, remove the last item and add a new item to the end of the list. This would be pretty easy to do.

As far as I know the position of the scrollview is not retrievable and there is no property to set the position of the scroolview.
